categories.label: Plant Food
categories.description: 1 point for each plant token behind your player screen (collected from fed population each round)

categories.label: Meat Food
categories.description: 1 point for each meat token behind your player screen (collected from fed population each round)

categories.label: Surviving Species
categories.description: 2 points for each species with at least 1 living population at the end of Round 4
